data.name: CaptchaSuccess
data.value: ✅ Captcha solved successfully! Welcome to the chat.

data.name: CaptchaExpired
data.value: ⏰ Captcha expired. Please request a new one.

data.name: WelcomeMessage
data.value:
👋 Hello! I'm a modern anti-spam bot for Telegram
I protect groups and channels with discussions from spam, flood and unwanted participants.

data.name: ModerationWarning
data.value:
👋 {0}, you are still a newcomer in this chat.
First 3 messages go through anti-spam check: • no emojis, ads and stop-words • ML analysis works

data.name: UserBanned
data.value: 🚫 You are banned in this chat: {0}

data.name: UserRestricted
data.value: ⚠️ You are restricted in this chat: {0}

data.name: CaptchaWelcome
data.value:
👋 {0}
Attention! First three messages go through anti-spam check, emojis{1} and ads are prohibited — they may be deleted automatically. Don't ask to write in PM!{2}

data.name: GenericError
data.value: ❌ Something went wrong. Please try again later. (Error ID: {0})

data.name: TooManyEmojis
data.value: Too many emojis in this message

data.name: MediaNotAllowed
data.value: Media is not allowed in first 3 messages
